zh.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaring於從1353年1月9日到1354年1月8日出生在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福。她於大約1375年與Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable在英國英格蘭爾斯維頓哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年在英國爾可努恰福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaring于从1353年1月9日到1354年1月8日出生在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福。她于大约1375年与Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable在英国英格兰爾斯維頓哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年在英国爾可努恰福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Joyce
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently from the Norman male name Josce (Middle English Josse), which in turn is from Jodocus, a Latinized form of a Breton name, Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, borne by a 7th-century Breton saint. The name was in use in England among Breton followers of William the Conqueror. However, although this was fairly common as a male given name in the Middle Ages, it had virtually died out by the 14th century. There is evidence of its use as a girl's name from the 16th century onwards in parishes with strong Puritan links, which suggests that it may have been associated with the vocabulary word joy; see Joy . It was strongly revived in the 19th century under the influence of popular fiction. It is borne by characters in Mrs Henry Wood's East Lynne ( 1861 ) and Edna Lyall's In the Golden Days ( 1885 ). Modern use may well have been influenced also by the common Irish surname derived from the medieval Norman male name. See also Joss .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaring was born from 9 January 1353 to 8 January 1354, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable about 1375, in Swettenham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1391, in Knutsford, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaring est née du 9 janvier 1353 au 8 janvier 1354, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable environ 1375, à Swettenham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1391, à Knutsford, Cheshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaringはから1353年1月9日まで1354年1月8日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた。約1375年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアスウエッテンハムでSir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constableと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年にイギリスチェシュアイアヌトスフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaring(은)는 1353년 1월 9일부터 1354년 1월 8일까지 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스w텐함에서 Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 영국 체실르 누츠퍼드에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joyce de Mainwaring родилась с 9 января 1353 по 8 января 1354 в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Davenport Sr., Sheriff of Flint, Mayor and Constable около 1375 г. в местности светтенам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1391 г. в местности нуцфорд, чешир, Англия.
